title: hieracium tridentatum subsp. firmum
intro: Hieracium tridentatum subsp. firmum, also known as the Rough Hawkweed or Firm Hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Hieracium tridentatum subsp. firmum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
